responsibilities: Build and maintain dashboards that track key performance indicators across sales, marketing, and operations
Analyze business data to identify trends, opportunities, and risks that inform strategic decision-making
Partner with business stakeholders to gather requirements and define metrics for new reporting initiatives
Write complex SQL queries to extract, aggregate, and analyze data from multiple operational systems
Prepare and present analytical findings to leadership through clear visualizations and executive summaries
Conduct ad hoc analyses to answer urgent business questions and support time-sensitive decision-making
Monitor data accuracy and consistency across dashboards, flagging and resolving discrepancies proactively
Document report definitions, data sources, and business logic to ensure consistent metric interpretation
Identify opportunities to automate manual reporting processes and improve analytics efficiency
Collaborate with data engineering teams to request and validate new data sources for reporting needs
